revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-035

No English Term

A solid structure, or a structure in the form of scaffolding, fixed in the ground and standing out sharply against the background, in order to be easily recognisable.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig48.jpg|400px|border]]
